name: Third-Party Data Sharing Policy | openEuler
description: Learn how openEuler shares data with third-party partners like Baidu Analytics and Authing for site analytics and user authentication management.

about.name: Third-Party Data Sharing Policy
about.description: Policy disclosing how the OpenAtom Foundation shares user data with third-party partners for website analytics and authentication services.

mentions.name: Beijing Baidu Netcom Science Technology Co., Ltd.
mentions.description: Provider of Baidu Statistics SDK used for daily data analysis of community operations on the openEuler website.

mentions.name: Beijing Steamory Technology Co., Ltd.
mentions.description: Provider of Authing account services used for authentication and personal data management of openEuler community users.
